balanceOfBatch(address[],uint256[]).details: See {IERC1155-balanceOfBatch}. Requirements: - `accounts` and `ids` must have the same length.

encodeTokenId(uint256,uint256,uint256).details: For single-bucket positions, set rangeLower == rangeUpper

params.marketId: The market identifier (must fit in uint128)
params.rangeLower: The lower bucket index (must fit in uint64)
params.rangeUpper: The upper bucket index (must fit in uint64)

returns.tokenId: The encoded token ID with rangeLower == rangeUpper == bucketId

setCID(uint256,bytes32).details: Only factory can set CID during market creation

authorizeMarket(address,uint256).notice: Authorize a market contract to mint/burn tokens

bucketCount(uint256).notice: Get the number of buckets covered by a token

burn(address,uint256,uint256).notice: Burn position tokens from a user

decodeTokenId(uint256).notice: Decode a token ID back into market ID and range bounds

encodeTokenId(uint256,uint256,uint256).notice: Encode market ID and range bounds into a single token ID

encodeTokenIdSingle(uint256,uint256).notice: Legacy encoder for single-bucket positions (backwards compatibility)

isRangeToken(uint256).notice: Check if a token represents a range (multiple buckets)

mint(address,uint256,uint256).notice: Mint position tokens to a user

setCID(uint256,bytes32).notice: Set IPFS CID for a market's metadata

uri(uint256).notice: Get token URI with IPFS CID
